titles.title: I Believe in a Hill Called Mount Calvary

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I believe in a hill called Mount Calvary I believe whatever the cost And when time has surrendered And earth is no more I'll still cling to the old rugged cross

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I believe that this life with its great mysteries Surely someday will come to an end Oh, but faith will conquer the darkness and death And will lead at last to my friend

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I believe that the Christ Who was slain on the cross Has the power to change lives today

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For He changed me completely A new life is mine That is why by the cross I will stay
